level_signals: Comp range $232K–$290K base, consistent with senior IC
Founding PM role with end-to-end ownership

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have 5+ years of relevant experience (e.g., product manager, founder, engineer, researcher etc.)
Experience developing AI/ML models, particularly in a research environment
Strong technical acumen — comfortable discussing model architecture, training data, and eval pipelines
Proven track record of shipping impactful features in fast-paced environments

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: A Computer Science, Engineering, or Math degree or equivalent technical experience
Experience working at a startup or high-growth company
Experience working on an enterprise B2B product

scope.surface: Decagon Research team — model training, agent architecture, evaluation systems, conversational AI
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS, enterprise conversational AI platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Customer adoption of new AI capabilities
core_responsibilities: Define the strategy and roadmap for Decagon's Research team. This includes model training, evaluation, experimentation, and more
Work closely with customers to deeply understand their problems and requirements
Translate these into clear model requirements, then partner with engineering to bring them to life
Interface tightly with Engineering, Infrastructure, Agent PM, and GTM teams
Manage relationships with key external partners

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($232K–$290K base)
Founding PM role with significant ownership and scope
Clear team mission and product area (Research / AI capabilities)
Accepts non-traditional backgrounds (founder, engineer, researcher counted as relevant experience)
Backed by top-tier VCs (a16z, Accel, Bain Capital, Coatue, Index Ventures)
red_flags: In-office requirement explicitly stated ('We're an in-office company') but no city is named in the JD — unclear where the role is based
No visa sponsorship or work authorization information provided
Posting date not available — unclear how fresh the listing is
